questions.text: <In addition to being an Indigenous person, you may belong to one or more racial or cultural groups on the following list. Are you...?/You may belong to one or more racial or cultural groups on the following list. Are you...?>
questions.extended_text: <In addition to being an Indigenous person, you may belong to one or more racial or cultural groups on the following list. Are you...?/You may belong to one or more racial or cultural groups on the following list. Are you...?>

questions.text: Which language do you speak most often at home?
questions.extended_text: Which language do you speak most often at home?

questions.text: Where were you born?
questions.extended_text: Where were you born?

questions.text: Which of the following categories best describes your current resident status in Canada?
questions.extended_text: Which of the following categories best describes your current resident status in Canada?

questions.text: In a few words, please explain why you <strongly disagree / somewhat disagree> that the last Canadian federal election (April 2025) was free and fair.
questions.extended_text: In a few words, please explain why you <strongly disagree / somewhat disagree> that the last Canadian federal election (April 2025) was free and fair.

questions.text: What does "the use of force by ordinary citizens to achieve political goals" mean to you?
questions.extended_text: What does "the use of force by ordinary citizens to achieve political goals" mean to you?

questions.text: In your view, what are the values that best represent Canada or Canadians? Please respond in a few words.
questions.extended_text: In your view, what are the values that best represent Canada or Canadians? Please respond in a few words.

questions.text: Have you ever personally experienced any of the following types of cybercrimes or incidents?
questions.extended_text: Have you ever personally experienced any of the following types of cybercrimes or incidents?

questions.text: How did you respond to the cybercrime(s) you experienced?
questions.extended_text: How did you respond to the cybercrime(s) you experienced?

questions.text: Which of the following categories best describes your current employment status?
questions.extended_text: Which of the following categories best describes your current employment status?
